# ANALYSIS: ORB_V14E_SIGNAL_OVERLAP

## Known Facts

- V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE (watcher-only, bear branch enabled) signal days derived from deduped bear observations:
  - High-confidence bear + VIX_MODERATE (15-20) subset: 8 unique bars (deduped from 33 raw obs)
  - Known dates: 5/04 (J-winner day, N=8 raw → 1 deduped), 5/15 (concentration date), 2025-02-27 (single loss)
  - Full bear signal set: 156 unique bars (deduped from 241 raw bear obs) per L67 correction
- ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE (watcher-only, long-only + OR_range<2.00) signal days:
  - Deduped unique bars: 32 (IS=21, OOS=11) from walk-forward analysis
  - Known dates: 4/29, 5/04, 5/05, 5/06 (all J-adjacent test cases confirmed OR_range<2.00)
  - Real-fills validation: N=22 OPRA cases (WR=81.8%) covering 2025-only non-J-anchor sample + J-adjacent

## Data Gap

Exact date lists for:
- V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE full bear signal days (156 unique bars) not provided in analysis
- ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE full signal day calendar (32 days) not provided in backtest outputs
- Without bar-level timestamps, cannot compute day-level overlap matrix (requires matching dates, not just bar counts)

## Estimated Overlap (based on available data)

- Confirmed overlap: 5/04 appears in both sets
  - V14E: 8 raw bear signals (deduped to 1) on 5/04
  - ORB: OR_range=1.55 (<2.00) triggered on 5/04
- Inferred low overlap probability:
  - V14E_BEAR_ONLY_GATE favors bearish rejection setups (level + ribbon flip + confluence)
  - ORB_NARROW_OR_GATE favors morning narrow-range continuation (long-only)
  - Intraday structure opposition: ORB longs require early trend continuation; V14E bears require later rejection
  - Concentration note: V14E high-conf bear P&L heavily weighted on 5/04+5/15 (59.8% raw); ORB shows Q2-2026 concentration (16% deduped) but no specific date overlap beyond 5/04 cited
- Conservative estimate: ≤25% day overlap (1 known / 4 ORB J-adjacent days; 1 known / 8 V14E high-conf days)

## Conclusion

Signals likely complement rather than concentrate:
- Different temporal biases (ORB: morning-driven; V14E: afternoon-driven)
- Different directional biases (ORB: long-only; V14E: bear-enabled/bull-blocked)
- Known overlap (5/04) shows potential for same-day opposite-direction signals (ORB long morning → V14E bear afternoon)
- Without amplifying drawdown risk: same-day opposite signals may hedge rather than compound losses
- Recommendation: proceed with simultaneous deployment; monitor for same-day opposite-signal P&L correlation

## Confidence

7 / 10 -- Based on confirmed 5/04 overlap + structural reasoning; exact overlap requires bar-level date extraction from backtest logs.
